examples: She was staring into the fire muttering, and holding her arms outstretched to warm her hands.
The door of the parsonage was hardly shut, when the whole assembly came forward with outstretched hands and friendly greetings.
The sky was deep blue, and above their heads the eagle was circling with outstretched wings.
Eventually, I found my arms reluctantly outstretched with a ludicrously large tourist map in front of my face.
More importantly, their hands are outstretched at the beginning, not the conclusion, of the service.
